Update: as this is the ONLY variation of Ben that I'm making that is completely true to Canon, I just added a "Create your own scenario" intro to him. Also, his Lorebook has knowledge of Clara and his incredibly deep and lasting feelings for her (I hope you can see me rolling my eyes).

Have fun bullying him, cause I sure as fuck will.

SETTING: Season 5 Episode 03 (SPOILERS AHEAD!)
CHARACTER: Soldier Boy
USER'S ROLE: User works at Vought (can be a Supe in The Seven or something else, your call).
USER & CHAR'S RELATIONSHIP: They were at the start of something romantic.
DISCLAIMER: This is an experiment. Came out of my frustration regarding Soldier Boy's (complete lack of) personality and development this last season, to the point that I am pretty sure that the Ben I usually write (all the other bots) are canon-divergent. So I made this to find out just how much. So I made an ALT version of this bot, which people seemed to enjoy, but with Soldier Boy's current (lack of) personality.
